title: Cobblemon: Freedom
description: A cobblemon modpack for me and my friends!
body:
This is a Cobblemon focused modpack with mods focused on creativity and art added alongside it!

Whether you take up painting, photography, building, or even cooking, this modpack has lots of options for you and your friends. And, of course, don't forget your Pokemon! Whether you plan to battle, catch em all, or maybe integrate them into your builds, there are lots of ways to interact with them using the additions in this modpack.

This modpack was designed for multiplayer, including the Essential mod to connect you with your friends, and Simple Voice Chat to have an in-game way to chat with the immersion brought by proximity chat.
As you and your friends all find their particular niches, there's plenty too discover about your Pokemon, too! With Mega Evolutions up to even the most recent DLC, new forms made by fellow fans of the franchise, and even never before seen Paradox and... Baby legendaries?!

Create sprawling towns, venture along roads carved through the world, and become the very best at whatever it is you wish: You have the _freedom_ to choose!
